- [ ] `pytest` passes locally
- [ ] `ruff check .` and `ruff format --check .` pass locally

## Docs

- [ ] Updated `README.md` if user-visible behavior changed
- [ ] Updated `CHANGELOG.md` under `## [Unreleased]` if user-visible
- [ ] Updated relevant `docs/` file if methodology or workflow changed
- [ ] N/A — no docs impact

## Checklist

- [ ] PR is under 400 lines of diff (or split if larger)
- [ ] Branch name follows `feat/` `fix/` `docs/` `chore/` convention
- [ ] Self-reviewed the diff before requesting review
